extract.title: Extract
extract.loadingTracks: Analyzing the file with FFmpeg... please be patient!
extract.selectVideo: Select a video on the side to see available tracks.
extract.extractTrackSuccess: Track extracted successfully! File saved at: {{srtPath}}
extract.errorLoadingTracks: Unable to read subtitles from this file.
extract.videoToolsRequiredToast: Install {{tools}} in Settings before using Extract.
extract.videoToolsRequiredDescription: This file depends on {{tools}} before Bakasub can extract subtitles.
extract.videoToolsRequiredHint: Extract is locked until {{tools}} are available.

translate.title: Translate
translate.selectFile: Select a subtitle file to translate.
translate.selectSubtitle: Select a subtitle on the left to analyze.
translate.metadataEditorDescription: Here you can provide additional information about the media to help improve translation quality. Additionally, to perform the translation, you must choose a model, preset, and target language.
translate.customMetadataDescription: Add any custom metadata that may help improve the translation. This can include specific slang, technical terms, or regional expressions relevant to the media. The more context you provide, the better the translation quality will be. Try to provide the context in English, even if the original subtitle is in another language, for best results.
translate.customMetadataPlaceholder: Ex: 'The protagonist is a cybersecurity specialist hacker.'
translate.translationOptionsDescription: Configure the model, preset, and target language for this translation job.
translate.removeSDHHelp: Remove descriptions for the deaf/hard of hearing
translate.useTmdbMetadataHelp: Automatically search and link media metadata from TMDB to improve translation context
translate.apiKeysRequiredDescription: Configure and save {{keys}} in Settings to unlock translation.
translate.apiKeysRequiredToast: Configure {{keys}} in Settings before opening Translate.
translate.apiKeysRequiredHint: Translate is locked until {{keys}} are configured.

jobDialog.title: Translation in Progress
jobDialog.failed: Translation failed. Check the logs for more details.
jobDialog.leaveWarning: You can close this dialog safely. The translation will continue in the background.

preflight.title: Pre-flight Analysis
preflight.error: Failed to run pre-flight analysis. Please try again.
preflight.disclaimer: These values are estimates and may not reflect the actual translation results.

merge.title: Merge
merge.videoToolsRequiredToast: Install {{tools}} in Settings before using Merge.
merge.videoToolsRequiredHint: Merge is locked until {{tools}} are available.

settings.title: Settings
settings.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave? All changes will be lost.

videoTools.title: Video Tools
videoTools.description: Bakasub depends on FFmpeg and MKVToolNix installed on your system to inspect tracks, extract subtitles, and merge translated files.
videoTools.readyDescription: All required video tools are available.
videoTools.installHint: Install the missing tools on the host system and restart Bakasub to enable video features.
videoTools.toast: Video features are unavailable because these tools are missing: {{tools}}.
videoTools.ffmpegMissingHelp: Required to extract subtitles from non-MKV containers.
videoTools.mkvmergeMissingHelp: Required to inspect tracks and mux translated subtitles back into MKV files.
videoTools.mkvextractMissingHelp: Required to extract subtitle tracks directly from MKV files.

instructions.title: Install missing tools
instructions.description: Use one of these host-level setups, then restart Bakasub so the health check can detect the binaries.
instructions.linuxCommand: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y ffmpeg mkvtoolnix
instructions.linuxStep1: Install FFmpeg and MKVToolNix from your distribution packages.
instructions.linuxStep2: Restart Bakasub after the installation completes.
instructions.windowsStep1: Download FFmpeg and MKVToolNix from their official websites.
instructions.windowsStep2: Add the folders containing ffmpeg.exe, mkvmerge.exe, and mkvextract.exe to PATH.
instructions.windowsStep3: Restart Bakasub and confirm the tools appear as available here.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Configure your API keys for external services. OpenRouter and TMDB are required for translation.
apiKeys.requiredBannerDescription: Translation stays locked until {{keys}} are configured and saved.
apiKeys.requiredBannerPendingSave: Save the new keys to unlock translation.

validation.configured: Configured. Edit the value to validate it again.
validation.invalidOpenRouter: Could not validate the OpenRouter key.
validation.invalidTmdb: Could not validate the TMDB token.

defaults.title: Translation Defaults
defaults.description: Set default values for new translations.
defaults.tmdbMetadataHelp: Automatically fetch media metadata from TMDB
